_comment: Schema documentation fixture for nmc_emergency_search auth-gate response (T034).
_description: This is NOT an HTTP tape. It documents the expected LookupError envelope shape returned when lookup(mode='fetch', tool_id='nmc_emergency_search') is called without a valid session identity. The Layer 3 auth-gate in executor.invoke() short-circuits before any upstream NMC HTTP call is made (SC-006, FR-025, FR-026).
message: Tool 'nmc_emergency_search' requires authentication. Provide a session identity to proceed.
